meaning: n.[解剖]二头肌,强健的筋肉
examples: The biceps reflex is elicited by asking the client to let his or her relaxed arm fall onto your arm.
Tammy: You can do biceps, absolutely.
A belt was cinched at his biceps and a syringe protruded from his forearm.
The only good news for New York was that X-rays on Nunez's biceps were negative.
Nunez screamed in pain, grabbed his right biceps and came out of the game.
